title: 40 Pieces Mouse Detail Sander Paper, Sanding Sheets Hook and Loop Assorted 60/80/120/240 Grits 5 Holes Detail Sandpaper Black and Decker Detail Palm Sander Pads
features: 【40 PCS】Including 40 pcs 4 different grades mouse detail sandpaper: 60, 80 ,120, 240 grits, 10 of each type. Almost all polishing requirements are met.
【E PAPER BACKING】Sandpaper with thick E paper backing, which not easily damaged when polished; High-strength resin bonding system increases the sandpaper service life.
【GOOD POLISHING EFFECT】EASYCOB sandpapers are made from aluminium oxide abrasive, durable and anti-static, good choice for sanding and polishing.
【HIGH QUALITY and DURABLE】Durable Velcro back, hook and loop backing for quick fitting, and pre-punched with 5 holes for dust extraction, easy to use. Suitable for using with 14cm detail sanders.

【WIDE APPLICATION】Mouse sanding sheets is suitable for grinding and polishing metal, non-metallic, wood, rubber, leather, plastics, stone, glass and other materials. Very practical and you can order according to your needs.
description: EASYCOB 40Pcs Detail Sander Paper, Mouse Sanding Sheets Hook and Loop Assorted Mixed Grits 60/80/120/240 5Holes Detail Sandpaper Sheet Black and Decker Detail Palm Sander Pads, Ideal for Sanding/Polishing/Rust Removal ￭ Wide grade girts range Come With grits of 60# 80# 120# 240#, cover most need of your house around work. ￭ High quality material and more durable Made from durable and calcined abrasive aluminum oxide grain, offering you better sanding experience and effect. High-strength resin bond system gives the sand paper a longer life. ￭ Fit with with mouse detail sander EASYCOB ASD01C sandpaper is designed for machine usage, higher speed sanding, quicker dust extraction and heavy duty removal. It fits for 140mm Sanding Machine and Good for mouse detail sander. ￭ Applies to material: Metal, non-metallic, wood, rubber, leather, plastic, stone, glass and other materials for grinding and polishing ￭ Specific Application Scenarios: carpentry, wall, floor, stone, surface of car body, polishing decorative materials, and dealing with burr on items’ surface, rust removal, polishing stainless steel weld and curved sanding, grinding the metal shell of electronic products and car wheel Specifications: Shape: Triangle Color: Reddish Brown Size: 140*140*100 mm Grit: 60# 80# 120# 240# Backing : E paper backing Number of holes: 5 Holes Abrasive: Aluminum Oxide Back technique: Hook and Loop Specifications Tolerance: +/- 1 mm Package Content: 10 x Sandpaper ( 60 Grits ) 10 x Sandpaper ( 80 Grits ) 10 x Sandpaper ( 120 Grit ) 10 x Sandpaper ( 240 Grit ) Notes: It is dry sandpaper. Do not use it in wet condition. Please store it in dry and ventilated place. The product life will be harmed after it gets wet
